---
title: "Forest Canopy Mapping"
description: "Estimating canopy cover and forest health from satellite imagery with a reproducible geospatial pipeline."
image: images/photo-1530563937443-1f02f662fa5c.jpg
categories: [Geospatial, Machine Learning, Remote Sensing]
---

## Overview

Placeholder content. This project classifies multispectral imagery to map canopy
density and flag early signs of stress, packaged as a reproducible pipeline that
re-runs as new imagery lands.

Photo by [Dale Nibbe](https://unsplash.com/@dalenmt) on [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/photos/6mU7uCAO64I).
